Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

Did you read https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/24463? AFAICT we trigger a rawhide kernel bug and an image update with newer kernels fixes that. I am not sure it is worth spending to much time on it unless you like to find the root cause.

> Did you read #24463? AFAICT we trigger a rawhide kernel bug and an image update with newer kernels fixes that. I am not sure it is worth spending to much time on it unless you like to find the root cause.

no sorry, I've missed  that update.  I agree it is not worth the trouble, I close this one
